title: Umami Flaky Festive Falafel Stir-fry
description: This Umami Flaky Festive Falafel Stir-fry is a delightful pescatarian-friendly Chinese dish featuring crispy falafel, aromatic vegetables, and a savory sauce that makes it an essential addition to any festive meal.
instructions: Steam the falafel for about 5 minutes until crispy. Drain and set aside.
Dice the onion, broccoli florets, bell pepper into bite-sized pieces.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
Add diced vegetables to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Mix together soy sauce and fish sauce (if using) with the water in a small bowl. Stir into the vegetables.
Gently fold in steamed falafel pieces. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, ensuring that all ingredients are heated through.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
